title: crotalaria nana
intro: Crotalaria nana is a small, annual or perennial herb native to tropical regions, belonging to the legume family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Crotalaria nana are attributed to its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat various skin conditions, while also exhibiting antioxidant properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of tea, decoction, or infusion, and also as a tincture or extract.
